.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(8, 8, 8) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.canvas-node-container .markdown-rendere.background: rgb(8, 8, 8) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.nav-files-container.background: rgb(8, 8, 8) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.nav-header.background: rgb(8, 8, 8) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(8, 8, 8) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(8, 8, 8) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(8, 8, 8) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(8, 8, 8) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(8, 8, 8) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(8, 8, 8) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(8, 8, 8) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(8, 8, 8) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(8, 8, 8) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input.prompt-input[type=\"text\"].background: rgb(8, 8, 8) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(8, 8, 8) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(8, 8, 8) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"text\"].background: rgb(8, 8, 8) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(17, 17, 18) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(17, 17, 18) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(17, 17, 18) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
